remarks: Wonderful in town living experience in Central Norwalk. Completely renovated 2 bedroom apartment (1,400SF), Hardwood Floors, Tall Ceilings, Central Gas Heat and Air, Exposed brick walls in Kitchen. Located near the Head of the Norwalk Harbor and Norwalk Green. Great restaurants, bars, and art galleries within walking distance. Enjoy concerts on the green or shop at the Farmers Market every Saturday located in front of the Congregational church. One can stroll on the Norwalk River Valley Trail or enjoy music events at the Wall St Theater. Landlord will require an excellent credit report, 2 years tax returns and two recommendations
